ogTitle: Skinners Shoot vs Sleepy Hollow: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Skinners Shoot and Sleepy Hollow.
heading: Skinners Shoot vs Sleepy Hollow — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Skinners Shoot, New South Wales and Sleepy Hollow, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Skinners Shoot has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Sleepy Hollow (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Skinners Shoot or Sleepy Hollow safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Skinners Shoot has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Sleepy Hollow scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Skinners Shoot scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Sleepy Hollow scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Skinners Shoot or Sleepy Hollow?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Skinners Shoot has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
